# Vježba 13 — Cjevovodi

## Fizikalni uvod: Reynoldsov broj i dinamika cjevovoda

Strujanje realnog fluida u zatvorenim kanalima i cijevima određeno je odnosom sila inercije i sila viskoznosti, što kvantificiramo pomoću bezdimenzijskog **Reynoldsovog broja ($Re$)**:
$$Re = \frac{\rho v d}{\mu} = \frac{v d}{\nu}$$

Ovisno o vrijednosti $Re$, strujanje poprima bitno različite karakteristike:
*   **Laminarno strujanje ($Re < 2320$):** Fluid se giba u pravilnim, paralelnim slojevima bez međusobnog miješanja. Profil brzine u poprečnom presjeku je **parabola**, a gubici energije su linearno proporcionalni brzini.
*   **Prijelazno područje ($2320 < Re < 4000$):** Nestabilan režim strujanja kod kojeg dolazi do povremenih pojava turbulencije.
*   **Turbulentno strujanje ($Re > 4000$):** Kaotično i nepravilno gibanje s izraženim vrtloženjem. Profil brzine postaje **plosnat** zbog intenzivnog miješanja impulsa čestica, a gubici energije ovise o kvadratu brzine.

### Otpori i hidrauličke mreže

Ukupni pad tlaka u cjevovodu rezultat je **linijskih otpora** (trenje duž stijenki cijevi) i **lokalnih otpora** (promjene smjera strujanja, ventili, suženja). Kod turbulentnog strujanja, intenzitet trenja izrazito ovisi o **relativnoj hrapavosti ($\epsilon/D$)** unutrašnje stijenke cijevi.

U inženjerskoj praksi često rješavamo složene sustave cjevovoda:
1.  **Serijsko spajanje:** Volumenski protok $Q$ je isti kroz sve dionice, dok su ukupni gubici energije zbroj gubitaka na svakoj pojedinačnoj dionici.
2.  **Paralelno spajanje:** Pad tlaka (gubitak energije) je isti za sve paralelne grane, dok se ukupni protok raspodjeljuje na grane ovisno o njihovom hidrauličkom otporu. 

Ispravno poznavanje ovih zakona nužno je za projektiranje efikasnih vodoopskrbnih, klimatizacijskih i industrijskih sustava te za pravilan odabir radne točke crpki.

***

### Interaktivni Moodyjev dijagram

Moodyjev dijagram je ključni alat u mehanici fluida za određivanje koeficijenta trenja $\lambda$. Ovisi o Reynoldsovom broju ($Re$) i relativnoj hrapavosti cijevi ($k/D$).

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Moodyjev Dijagram -->
<div id="v13-moody-widget" style="max-width: 1040px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 22px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(15,23,42,0.12); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #0f172a; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 24px; font-weight: 800;">📊 Moodyjev dijagram: gdje si na karti otpora?</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 22px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.6;">
        <strong>Kako čitati Moodyja:</strong> Najprije lociraš <strong>Re</strong> po vodoravnoj osi. Zatim provjeriš jesi li u laminarnom, prijelaznom ili turbulentnom području. Tek kad si u turbulentnom području ima smisla pratiti krivulju za određeni <strong>k/D</strong> i očitati odgovarajući <strong>λ</strong>.
    </div>

    <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #172554 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%); border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; overflow: hidden; height: 560px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(148,163,184,0.08);">
        <canvas id="v13-moody-canvas" width="960" height="560" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block;"></canvas>
        <div style="position: absolute; left: 18px; top: 18px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8); border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.3); border-radius: 12px; color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.74rem; line-height: 1.45; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); max-width: 220px;">
            <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc; margin-bottom: 6px;">Legenda</div>
            <div><span style="color:#fbbf24; font-weight:700;">●</span> Trenutna radna točka</div>
            <div><span style="color:#38bdf8; font-weight:700;">━</span> Glatka cijev / mali k/D</div>
            <div><span style="color:#f97316; font-weight:700;">━</span> Veća hrapavost</div>
            <div><span style="display:inline-block; width:12px; height:10px; background:rgba(34,197,94,0.18); border-radius:3px;"></span> Laminarno</div>
            <div><span style="display:inline-block; width:12px; height:10px; background:rgba(245,158,11,0.18); border-radius:3px;"></span> Prijelaz</div>
        </div>
        <div style="position: absolute; right: 18px; top: 18px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8); border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.3); border-radius: 12px; color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.74rem; line-height: 1.45; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); min-width: 180px; text-align: right;">
            <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 4px;">Trenutno očitanje</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fbbf24;">λ = <span id="v13-res-lambda">---</span></div>
            <div>Režim: <b id="v13-res-regime">---</b></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(230px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-top: 20px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Reynolds (log Re): <span id="v13-v-re" style="color:#2563eb;">5.0</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="v13-re-slider" min="3" max="8" step="0.01" value="5" style="width: 100%;">

            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 22px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Relativna hrapavost k/D: <span id="v13-v-kd" style="color:#2563eb;">0.0010</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="v13-kd-slider" min="-6" max="-1.3" step="0.1" value="-3" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>

        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Re</div>
                <div id="v13-re-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Pravilo za λ</div>
                <div id="v13-rule-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">---</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">k/D</div>
                <div id="v13-kd-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.6;">
            <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="v13-explainer"></span>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v13-moody-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const reS = document.getElementById('v13-re-slider');
    const kdS = document.getElementById('v13-kd-slider');
    const roughnessCurves = [0, 1e-5, 5e-5, 1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 5e-3, 1e-2];
    const curveColors = ['#38bdf8', '#60a5fa', '#818cf8', '#a78bfa', '#f472b6', '#fb7185', '#f97316', '#facc15'];
    const plot = { left: 92, right: canvas.width - 74, top: 46, bottom: canvas.height - 82 };

    function solveLambda(re, kd) {
        if (re <= 0) return 0.02;
        if (re < 2320) return 64 / re;
        const inv = -1.8 * Math.log10(Math.pow(Math.max(kd, 1e-10) / 3.7, 1.11) + 6.9 / re);
        return 1 / (inv * inv);
    }

    function classifyRegime(re) {
        if (re < 2320) return { label: 'laminarno', rule: '64/Re', color: '#4ade80' };
        if (re < 4000) return { label: 'prijelazno', rule: 'nestabilno', color: '#f59e0b' };
        return { label: 'turbulentno', rule: 'Haaland/Colebrook', color: '#f87171' };
    }

    function xFromRe(re) {
        return plot.left + ((Math.log10(re) - 3) / 5) * (plot.right - plot.left);
    }

    function yFromLambda(lambda) {
        const logMin = Math.log10(0.008);
        const logMax = Math.log10(0.12);
        return plot.top + ((logMax - Math.log10(lambda)) / (logMax - logMin)) * (plot.bottom - plot.top);
    }

    function formatKd(kd) {
        if (kd < 1e-4) return kd.toExponential(1);
        return kd.toFixed(4);
    }

    function drawAxes() {
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.28)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';

        for (let decade = 3; decade <= 8; decade += 1) {
            const re = Math.pow(10, decade);
            const x = xFromRe(re);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x, plot.top);
            ctx.lineTo(x, plot.bottom);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText('10^' + decade, x - 14, plot.bottom + 28);
        }

        const lambdaTicks = [0.008, 0.01, 0.015, 0.02, 0.03, 0.04, 0.06, 0.08, 0.1];
        lambdaTicks.forEach((tick) => {
            const y = yFromLambda(tick);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(plot.left, y);
            ctx.lineTo(plot.right, y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText(tick.toFixed(tick < 0.01 ? 3 : 2), 42, y + 4);
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(plot.left, plot.top);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.left, plot.bottom);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.right, plot.bottom);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Reynoldsov broj Re', plot.left + (plot.right - plot.left) / 2 - 62, canvas.height - 28);
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(26, plot.top + (plot.bottom - plot.top) / 2 + 42);
        ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
        ctx.fillText('Koeficijent trenja λ', 0, 0);
        ctx.restore();
    }

    function plotCurve(kd, color) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = kd === 0 ? 2.8 : 1.8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let started = false;
        for (let logRe = 3; logRe <= 8; logRe += 0.025) {
            const re = Math.pow(10, logRe);
            if (kd !== 0 && re < 2800) continue;
            const lambda = solveLambda(re, kd === 0 ? 1e-10 : kd);
            if (lambda < 0.008 || lambda > 0.12) continue;
            const x = xFromRe(re);
            const y = yFromLambda(lambda);
            if (!started) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                started = true;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawCurrentPoint(re, lambda, regime) {
        const x = xFromRe(re);
        const y = yFromLambda(lambda);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(248,250,252,0.35)';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x, plot.bottom);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.left, y);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = regime.color;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x, y, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('radna točka', x + 12, y - 10);
    }

    function draw(re, kd, lambda, regime) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(34,197,94,0.16)';
        ctx.fillRect(plot.left, plot.top, xFromRe(2320) - plot.left, plot.bottom - plot.top);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(245,158,11,0.16)';
        ctx.fillRect(xFromRe(2320), plot.top, xFromRe(4000) - xFromRe(2320), plot.bottom - plot.top);

        drawAxes();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fbbf24';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let started = false;
        for (let reLam = 700; reLam <= 2300; reLam += 25) {
            const lam = 64 / reLam;
            const x = xFromRe(reLam);
            const y = yFromLambda(lam);
            if (!started) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                started = true;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        roughnessCurves.forEach((curve, index) => plotCurve(curve, curveColors[index]));
        drawCurrentPoint(re, lambda, regime);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('laminarno', xFromRe(1250) - 32, plot.top + 24);
        ctx.fillText('prijelaz', xFromRe(2850) - 24, plot.top + 24);
        ctx.fillText('turbulentne krivulje hrapavosti', xFromRe(2e5), plot.top + 24);

        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        roughnessCurves.slice(2).forEach((curve, index) => {
            const sampleRe = 5e7;
            const x = xFromRe(sampleRe) + 6;
            const y = yFromLambda(solveLambda(sampleRe, curve));
            if (y > plot.top + 12 && y < plot.bottom - 8) {
                ctx.fillStyle = curveColors[index + 2];
                ctx.fillText('k/D ' + formatKd(curve), x, y + 4);
            }
        });
    }

    function update() {
        const logRe = parseFloat(reS.value);
        const re = Math.pow(10, logRe);
        const kd = Math.pow(10, parseFloat(kdS.value));
        const lambda = solveLambda(re, kd);
        const regime = classifyRegime(re);

        document.getElementById('v13-v-re').textContent = logRe.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v13-v-kd').textContent = formatKd(kd);
        document.getElementById('v13-res-lambda').textContent = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('v13-res-regime').textContent = regime.label;
        document.getElementById('v13-re-card').textContent = re.toExponential(2);
        document.getElementById('v13-rule-card').textContent = regime.rule;
        document.getElementById('v13-kd-card').textContent = formatKd(kd);
        document.getElementById('v13-explainer').textContent = `Za Re ≈ ${re.toExponential(2)} i k/D = ${formatKd(kd)} nalaziš se u ${regime.label} području. Zato se λ očitava kao ${lambda.toFixed(4)}, pri čemu je pravilo ${regime.rule}. Pomak točke udesno znači jače inercijske učinke, a pomak prema gore veći otpor trenja.`;

        draw(re, kd, lambda, regime);
    }

    reS.oninput = update;
    kdS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Laminarni pad tlaka (Hagen-Poiseuille) -->
<div id="z120-laminar-widget" style="max-width: 1040px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🌡️ Laminarno strujanje: Utjecaj temperature i viskoznosti</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati laminarni slučaj:</strong> Ovdje temperatura najprije mijenja dinamičku viskoznost <strong>μ</strong>, a tek to mijenja Reynoldsov broj i koeficijent trenja <strong>λ = 64/Re</strong>. Zato je lanac <strong>T -> μ -> Re -> λ -> Δp</strong> važniji od samog završnog pada tlaka.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 430px;">
            <canvas id="z120-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; left: 50px; top: 20px; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">ULAZ (p1)</div>
                <div id="z120-p1-gauge" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;">200 kPa</div>
            </div>
            <div style="position: absolute; right: 50px; top: 20px; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">IZLAZ (p2)</div>
                <div id="z120-p2-gauge" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;">11.8 kPa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Temperatura T: <span id="z120-v-T" style="color:#2563eb;">10</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="z120-T-slider" min="5" max="80" step="1" value="10" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Brzina v: <span id="z120-v-v" style="color:#2563eb;">1.2</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z120-v-slider" min="0.1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Fizikalna stanja:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Reynolds Re:</span> <b id="z120-res-re">1836</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Pad tlaka Δp:</span> <b id="z120-res-dp">188.2 kPa</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 1px solid #bee3f8; padding-top: 5px;">
                        <span>Gubitak hw:</span> <b id="z120-res-hw">19.2 m</b>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">μ</div>
                    <div id="z120-res-mu" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000 Pa s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">λ = 64/Re</div>
                    <div id="z120-res-lambda" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z120-explainer"></span>
            </div>
            
            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.4; font-style: italic;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni uvid:</b> Kod laminarnog strujanja pad tlaka je direktno proporcionalan brzini i viskoznosti. Kako temperatura raste, viskoznost vode opada, što drastično smanjuje gubitke energije.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z120-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const tS = document.getElementById('z120-T-slider');
    const vS = document.getElementById('z120-v-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for (let index = 0; index < 100; index++) {
        particles.push({ t: Math.random(), yRel: Math.random() * 2 - 1 });
    }

    const state = { v: 1.2 };

    function getViscosity(T) {
        return 0.00179 / (1 + 0.0337 * T + 0.00022 * T * T);
    }

    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const L = 15;
        const d = 0.002;
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;
        const mu = getViscosity(T);

        const Re = (rho * v * d) / mu;
        const lambda = 64 / Re;
        const dp = lambda * (L / d) * (rho * v * v / 2) / 1000;
        const hw = (dp * 1000) / (rho * g);

        state.v = v;

        document.getElementById('z120-v-T').innerText = T;
        document.getElementById('z120-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z120-res-re').innerText = Math.round(Re);
        document.getElementById('z120-res-dp').innerText = dp.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-hw').innerText = hw.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-mu').innerText = mu.toFixed(5) + ' Pa s';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-lambda').innerText = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z120-p2-gauge').innerText = Math.max(0, 200 - dp).toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z120-explainer').textContent = `Pri temperaturi ${T.toFixed(0)}°C dinamička viskoznost je ${mu.toFixed(5)} Pa s, pa za brzinu ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s dobivaš Re ≈ ${Math.round(Re)} i laminarni koeficijent λ = ${lambda.toFixed(4)}. To vodi do pada tlaka ${dp.toFixed(1)} kPa i gubitka energije ${hw.toFixed(1)} m.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 400);
        const cy = 200;
        const dPx = 100;

        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(50, 0, 500, 0);
        grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)');
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(50, cy - dPx / 2, 450, dPx);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, cy - dPx / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(500, cy - dPx / 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, cy + dPx / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(500, cy + dPx / 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.3)';
        ctx.setLineDash([2, 2]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let y = -dPx / 2; y <= dPx / 2; y += 5) {
            const rRel = Math.abs(y) / (dPx / 2);
            const vx = (1 - rRel * rRel) * 80;
            if (y === -dPx / 2) ctx.moveTo(50 + vx, cy + y);
            else ctx.lineTo(50 + vx, cy + y);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const rRel = Math.abs(particle.yRel);
            const vLocal = 2 * state.v * (1 - rRel * rRel);
            particle.t += 0.005 * vLocal;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;

            const px = 50 + particle.t * 450;
            const py = cy + particle.yRel * (dPx / 2 - 5);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    tS.oninput = update;
    vS.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>


```

***

### Zadatak Z121 — Turbulentno strujanje zraka {.unnumbered}

Zrak struji kroz 7 m dug pravokutni ventilacijski kanal dimenzija $150 \times 200\,\text{mm}$. Kanal je izrađen od pocinčanog lima ($k=4,5 \cdot 10^{-5}\,\text{m}$), tlak zraka je $101325\,\text{Pa}$, temperatura $35^\circ\text{C}$, a srednja brzina strujanja $7\,\text{m/s}$.

**Zadano:** $L=7\,\text{m}$, $b=200\,\text{mm}$, $h=150\,\text{mm}$, $p=101325\,\text{Pa}$, $t=35^\circ\text{C}$, $v_{sr}=7\,\text{m/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$
**Odrediti:** $\Delta p$, $P$

**Rješenje:**
1. $d_{ekv} = \frac{4A}{O} = \mathbf{0,1714 \, \text{m}}$.
2. $Re = \mathbf{72507}$ (Turbulentno).
3. $\lambda = \mathbf{0,0204}$ (uz $k/d = 0,00026$).
4. $\Delta p = \mathbf{23,3 \, \text{Pa}}, P = \dot{V} \Delta p = \mathbf{4,9 \, \text{W}}$.

***

### Zadatak Z122 — Difuzor s lokalnim gubicima {.unnumbered}

Horizontalna cijev promjera 60 mm postupno povećava promjer na 90 mm. Stjenke dijela koji se širi otklonjene su od horizontalne osi pod kutom od 30°. Srednja brzina i tlak vode prije difuzora iznose 7 m/s i 150 kPa. Potrebno je odrediti pad visine dobave u difuzoru i tlak u cijevi većeg promjera.

**Zadano:** $d_1=60\,\text{mm}$, $d_2=90\,\text{mm}$, $\alpha=30^\circ$, $v_1=7\,\text{m/s}$, $p_1=150\,\text{kPa}$
**Odrediti:** $h_{wm}$, $p_2$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_2 = 3,11 \, \text{m/s}$.
2. $h_{wm} = \zeta \frac{v_1^2}{2g} = \mathbf{0,175 \, \text{m}}$.
3.

    $$
    p_2 = p_1 + \rho \left( \frac{\beta v_1^2 - \beta v_2^2}{2} - g h_{wm} \right)
    = \mathbf{169,1 \, \text{kPa}}
    $$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Difuzor i lokalni gubici -->
<div id="z122-diffuser-widget" style="max-width: 1040px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📐 Difuzor: usporavanje, povrat tlaka i odvajanje struje</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.6;">
        <strong>Kako čitati difuzor:</strong> U urednom difuzoru strujnice se otvaraju glatko, brzina pada s <strong>v₁</strong> na <strong>v₂</strong>, a dio brzinske visine vraća se u tlak. Kad kut postane prevelik, granični sloj se odvaja od stijenke i uz zid nastaju vrtložne zone koje pretvaraju dobitak u dodatni lokalni gubitak.
    </div>

    <div style="position: relative; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fafc 0%, #eef6ff 100%); border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; overflow: hidden; height: 440px;">
        <canvas id="z122-canvas" width="920" height="440" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block;"></canvas>
        <div id="z122-sep-warn" style="position: absolute; right: 18px; top: 18px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.92); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 9px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; display: none; letter-spacing: 0.02em;">
            ODVAJANJE STRUJE UZ STIJENKU
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-top: 20px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Kut širenja α: <span id="z122-v-alpha" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span>°</label>
            <input type="range" id="z122-alpha-slider" min="5" max="60" step="1" value="30" style="width: 100%;">

            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 18px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Ulazna brzina v₁: <span id="z122-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">7.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="z122-v1-slider" min="1" max="15" step="0.5" value="7" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>

        <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #f97316;">
            <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9a3412; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Bilanca učinaka</div>
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Koeficijent ζ</span><b id="z122-res-zeta">0.07</b></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Lokalni gubitak hwm</span><b id="z122-res-hwm">0.18 m</b></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Izlazni tlak p₂</span><b id="z122-res-p2" style="color:#c2410c;">169.1 kPa</b></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂</div>
                <div id="z122-res-v2" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Δ(v²/2g)</div>
                <div id="z122-res-dhead" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Režim kuta</div>
                <div id="z122-res-regime" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">miran</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.6; margin-top: 16px;">
        <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z122-explainer"></span>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z122-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const aS = document.getElementById('z122-alpha-slider');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('z122-v1-slider');
    const lanes = [-0.82, -0.62, -0.42, -0.22, 0, 0.22, 0.42, 0.62, 0.82];
    const particles = [];
    const state = { alpha: 30, v1: 7, v2: 3.11, zeta: 0.07, hwm: 0.18, deltaHead: 0.18, p2: 169.1, separated: true, regime: 'odvajanje', time: 0 };

    lanes.forEach((lane, laneIndex) => {
        for (let index = 0; index < 8; index++) {
            particles.push({ lane, phase: (index / 8 + laneIndex * 0.03) % 1, bias: 0.9 + Math.random() * 0.25 });
        }
    });

    function getZeta(alpha) {
        if (alpha <= 8) return 0.05 + (8 - alpha) * 0.004;
        if (alpha <= 14) return 0.05 + (alpha - 8) * 0.02;
        if (alpha <= 25) return 0.17 + (alpha - 14) * 0.03;
        return 0.5 + (alpha - 25) * 0.045;
    }

    function getGeometry(alpha) {
        const cy = canvas.height / 2 + 18;
        const halfIn = 34;
        const halfOut = 68;
        const inletStart = 44;
        const inletEnd = 210;
        const diffL = Math.max(150, Math.min(320, (halfOut - halfIn) / Math.tan(alpha * Math.PI / 180)));
        const outletStart = inletEnd + diffL;
        const outletEnd = canvas.width - 56;
        return { cy, halfIn, halfOut, inletStart, inletEnd, diffL, outletStart, outletEnd };
    }

    function getHalfHeight(x, geometry) {
        if (x <= geometry.inletEnd) return geometry.halfIn;
        if (x <= geometry.outletStart) {
            const t = (x - geometry.inletEnd) / geometry.diffL;
            return geometry.halfIn + t * (geometry.halfOut - geometry.halfIn);
        }
        return geometry.halfOut;
    }

    function streamlineY(x, lane, geometry, separated) {
        const half = getHalfHeight(x, geometry) - 8;
        let localLane = lane;
        if (separated && x > geometry.inletEnd + 0.35 * geometry.diffL && Math.abs(lane) > 0.58) {
            const t = Math.min(1, (x - (geometry.inletEnd + 0.35 * geometry.diffL)) / (0.65 * geometry.diffL));
            localLane = lane * (1 - 0.32 * t);
        }
        return geometry.cy + localLane * half;
    }

    function update() {
        const alpha = parseFloat(aS.value);
        const v1 = parseFloat(v1S.value);
        const p1 = 150;
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;
        const d1 = 0.06;
        const d2 = 0.09;
        const v2 = v1 * Math.pow(d1 / d2, 2);
        const zeta = getZeta(alpha);
        const hwm = zeta * (v1 * v1 / (2 * g));
        const deltaHead = (v1 * v1 - v2 * v2) / (2 * g);
        const p2 = p1 + (rho * (((v1 * v1) - (v2 * v2)) / 2 - g * hwm)) / 1000;
        const regime = alpha <= 10 ? 'povoljno' : (alpha <= 18 ? 'granično' : 'odvajanje');

        state.alpha = alpha;
        state.v1 = v1;
        state.v2 = v2;
        state.zeta = zeta;
        state.hwm = hwm;
        state.deltaHead = deltaHead;
        state.p2 = p2;
        state.separated = alpha > 18;
        state.regime = regime;

        document.getElementById('z122-v-alpha').textContent = alpha.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z122-v-v1').textContent = v1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z122-res-zeta').textContent = zeta.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z122-res-hwm').textContent = hwm.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-p2').textContent = p2.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-v2').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-dhead').textContent = deltaHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-regime').textContent = regime;
        document.getElementById('z122-explainer').textContent = `Za kut ${alpha.toFixed(0)}° i ulaznu brzinu ${v1.toFixed(1)} m/s idealno bi se moglo vratiti ${deltaHead.toFixed(2)} m brzinske visine. No stvarni difuzor pritom gubi ${hwm.toFixed(2)} m zbog lokalnog otpora, pa izlazni tlak završava na ${p2.toFixed(1)} kPa. Kad kut pređe približno 18°, uz stijenku se pojavljuju vrtložne zone odvajanja.`;
        document.getElementById('z122-sep-warn').style.display = state.separated ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    function draw() {
        state.time += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const geometry = getGeometry(state.alpha);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut, 0, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, '#dbeafe');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, '#bfdbfe');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(geometry.inletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.22)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.4;
        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let x = geometry.inletStart; x <= geometry.outletEnd; x += 10) {
                const wiggle = (state.regime === 'povoljno' ? 0 : state.regime === 'granično' ? 2.5 : 4.5) * Math.sin((x * 0.025) + state.time * 0.015 + lane * 4) * (Math.abs(lane) * 0.65);
                const y = streamlineY(x, lane, geometry, state.separated) + wiggle;
                if (x === geometry.inletStart) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const laneSpeed = 0.55 + (1 - Math.abs(particle.lane)) * 0.65;
            particle.phase = (particle.phase + 0.0018 * state.v1 * laneSpeed * particle.bias) % 1;
            const x = geometry.inletStart + particle.phase * (geometry.outletEnd - geometry.inletStart);
            const wiggle = (state.regime === 'povoljno' ? 0 : state.regime === 'granično' ? 2.5 : 4.5) * Math.sin((x * 0.025) + state.time * 0.015 + particle.lane * 4) * (Math.abs(particle.lane) * 0.65);
            const y = streamlineY(x, particle.lane, geometry, state.separated) + wiggle;
            ctx.fillStyle = Math.abs(particle.lane) > 0.62 && state.separated ? '#f97316' : '#2563eb';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        if (state.separated) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(249,115,22,0.9)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            [geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut + 22, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut - 22].forEach((yCenter, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(geometry.outletStart + 70, yCenter, 18, index === 0 ? Math.PI * 0.1 : Math.PI * 1.1, index === 0 ? Math.PI * 1.85 : Math.PI * 0.85, index !== 0);
                ctx.stroke();
            });
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f766e';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(geometry.inletEnd + 10, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 42);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart - 10, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 42);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f766e';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('pad v i mogući povrat tlaka', geometry.inletEnd + 18, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 50);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v₁ = ' + state.v1.toFixed(1) + ' m/s', 34, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn - 14);
        ctx.fillText('v₂ = ' + state.v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', canvas.width - 160, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 14);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    aS.oninput = update;
    v1S.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>


```

***

### Zadatak Z123 — Protok između dva spremnika {.unnumbered}

Voda temperature 10°C struji iz većeg spremnika u manji kroz cijev promjera 50 mm izrađene od sivog lijeva. Hrapavost iznosi $2,6 \cdot 10^{-4} \, \text{m}$, dok su koeficijenti mjesnih gubitaka redom: $\zeta_u = 0,5$ (ulaz), $\zeta_k = 0,3$ (koljeno), $\zeta_v = 0,2$ (ventil), $\zeta_i = 1,06$ (izlaz).

**Zadano:** $t=10^\circ\text{C}$, $d=50\,\text{mm}$, $L=80\,\text{m}$, $h=9\,\text{m}$, $\dot{V}=6\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,26\,\text{mm}$, $z_2=4\,\text{m}$, $\sum \zeta = 2,36$
**Odrediti:** $z_1$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v = 3,06 \, \text{m/s}, Re = 116865, \lambda = 0,0315$.
2. $\sum \zeta = 2,36$.
3.

    $$
    h_w = \frac{v^2}{2g} \left( 2,36 + 0,0315 \frac{89}{0,05} \right)
    = \mathbf{27,8 \, \text{m}}
    $$
4. $z_1 = z_2 + h_w = \mathbf{31,8 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Budžet gubitaka cjevovoda -->
<div id="z123-budget-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📊 Budžet gubitaka: Linijski vs. Lokalni</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati budžet:</strong> Prvo iz protoka i hrapavosti dobivaš <strong>Re</strong> i <strong>λ</strong>, zatim razdvajaš linijske i lokalne gubitke u istom cjevovodu. Tek njihov zbroj daje ukupni gubitak <strong>h_w</strong>, a on određuje potrebnu kotu slobodne površine <strong>z₁</strong>.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <!-- Energy Line Visualization -->
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 520px;">
            <canvas id="z123-canvas" width="520" height="520" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Floating Metrics -->
            <div style="position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; font-size: 0.7rem;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">UKUPNI GUBITAK hw</div>
                <div id="z123-hw-total" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;">27.8 m</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls and Pie Chart -->
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Protok Q: <span id="z123-v-vdot" style="color:#2563eb;">6.0</span> L/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z123-vdot-slider" min="1" max="15" step="0.5" value="6" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Hrapavost k: <span id="z123-v-k" style="color:#2563eb;">0.26</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z123-k-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.26" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;">Raspodjela otpora [%]</div>
                <div style="display: flex; height: 30px; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;">
                    <div id="z123-bar-friction" style="width: 90%; background: #f97316;" title="Trenje u cijevi"></div>
                    <div id="z123-bar-local" style="width: 10%; background: #3b82f6;" title="Lokalni gubici"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.65rem; margin-top: 5px; font-weight: 600;">
                    <span style="color:#ea580c;">LINIJSKI (Trenje)</span>
                    <span style="color:#2563eb;">LOKALNI (Zeta)</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Re</div>
                    <div id="z123-re-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">λ</div>
                    <div id="z123-lambda-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">z₁</div>
                    <div id="z123-z1-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 m</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z123-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z123-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vdotS = document.getElementById('z123-vdot-slider'), kS = document.getElementById('z123-k-slider');

    function solveLambda(Re, kd) {
        if (Re < 2320) return 64 / Re;
        let f = 0.02;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            f = 1 / Math.pow(-2 * Math.log10(kd / 3.7 + 2.51 / (Re * Math.sqrt(f))), 2);
        }
        return f;
    }

    function update() {
        const vdot_l = parseFloat(vdotS.value), k_mm = parseFloat(kS.value);
        const d = 0.05, L = 89, rho = 1000, mu = 0.0013, g = 9.81;
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const v = (vdot_l / 1000) / A;
        const Re = (rho * v * d) / mu;
        const lambda = solveLambda(Re, k_mm / (d * 1000));
        
        const hw_lin = lambda * (L / d) * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const sum_zeta = 2.36;
        const hw_loc = sum_zeta * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const hw_total = hw_lin + hw_loc;
        const z1 = 4 + hw_total;
        
        const perc_lin = (hw_lin / hw_total) * 100;

        document.getElementById('z123-v-vdot').innerText = vdot_l.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z123-v-k').innerText = k_mm.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z123-hw-total').innerText = hw_total.toFixed(1) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-friction').style.width = perc_lin + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-local').style.width = (100 - perc_lin) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-re-card').textContent = Math.round(Re);
        document.getElementById('z123-lambda-card').textContent = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z123-z1-card').textContent = z1.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z123-explainer').textContent = `Za protok ${vdot_l.toFixed(1)} L/s i hrapavost ${k_mm.toFixed(2)} mm dobivaš Re ≈ ${Math.round(Re)} i λ = ${lambda.toFixed(4)}. Linijski gubitak tada iznosi ${hw_lin.toFixed(1)} m, lokalni ${hw_loc.toFixed(1)} m, pa ukupni gubitak ${hw_total.toFixed(1)} m traži uzvodnu kotu z₁ ≈ ${z1.toFixed(1)} m.`;

        draw(hw_total, hw_lin, hw_loc);
    }

    function draw(hwt, hlin, hloc) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const oy = canvas.height - 44;
        const totalHead = 4 + hwt;
        const topPadding = 84;
        const scale = Math.min(10, (oy - topPadding) / Math.max(totalHead, 6));
        const sourceX = 28;
        const tankWidth = 92;
        const targetX = canvas.width - 120;
        const sourceTop = oy - totalHead * scale;
        const targetTop = oy - 4 * scale;
        const pipeY = oy - 24;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#ebf8ff';
        ctx.fillRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.fillRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.strokeRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, pipeY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop - 6);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop + 10);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop + 6);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('EGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(28, sourceTop - 10));
        ctx.fillText('HGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(44, sourceTop + 14));
        ctx.fillText('z1 = ' + totalHead.toFixed(1) + ' m', sourceX + 4, Math.max(26, sourceTop - 14));
        ctx.fillText('z2 = 4.0 m', targetX + 8, targetTop - 14);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('hw,lin = ' + hlin.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.35);
        ctx.fillText('hw,loc = ' + hloc.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.62);
    }

    vdotS.oninput = update; kS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>


```

***

### Zadatak Z124 — Paralelni cjevovodi {.unnumbered}

Voda temperature 20°C crpi se iz spremnika A u spremnik B putem dviju paralelnih cijevi duljine 36 m. Volumenski protok na izlazu iz pumpe iznosi 30 L/s. Zanemarujemo mjesne gubitke na račvi, sastavištu i koljenima.

**Zadano:** $t=20^\circ\text{C}$, $L=36\,\text{m}$, $d_1=40\,\text{mm}$, $d_2=80\,\text{mm}$, $\dot{V}_{tot}=30\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$
**Odrediti:** $p_R$, $\dot{V}_1$, $\dot{V}_2$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_2 = v_1 \sqrt{\frac{\lambda_1 d_2}{\lambda_2 d_1}} = 1,56 v_1$.
2.

    $$
    \dot{V}_{tot} = A_1 v_1 + A_2 (1,56 v_1)
    $$

    $$
    v_1 = \mathbf{3,29 \, \text{m/s}}, \qquad v_2 = \mathbf{5,15 \, \text{m/s}}
    $$
3. $\dot{V}_1 = \mathbf{4,1 \, \text{L/s}}, \dot{V}_2 = \mathbf{25,9 \, \text{L/s}}$.
4. $H_{pump} = (z_B - z_A) + h_{wl1} = \mathbf{18,93 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Paralelne cijevi i raspodjela protoka -->
<div id="z124-parallel-widget" style="max-width: 1040px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🔌 Hidraulička analogija: Raspodjela u paralelnim granama</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati paralelne grane:</strong> U obje grane pad energije mora biti isti, pa raspodjela ne ovisi proizvoljno o protoku nego o hidrauličkom otporu svake grane. Šira cijev zato preuzima veći dio ukupnog protoka jer za isti gubitak može nositi veću brzinu.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="z124-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Pressure Gauge at Junction -->
            <div style="position: absolute; left: 150px; top: 180px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #3b82f6; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">TLAK U RAČVI p_R</div>
                <div id="z124-pr-val" style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;">--- kPa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Ukupni protok Q_tot: <span id="z124-v-vtot" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span> L/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z124-vtot-slider" min="10" max="60" step="1" value="30" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Promjer cijevi 2 (D2): <span id="z124-v-d2" style="color:#2563eb;">80</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z124-d2-slider" min="40" max="120" step="5" value="80" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <!-- Flow Split Bars -->
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 15px;">Raspodjela protoka:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                            <span>Cijev 1 (40mm):</span> <b id="z124-v1-out">4.1 L/s</b>
                        </div>
                        <div style="height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
                            <div id="z124-bar-v1" style="width: 14%; height: 100%; background: #3b82f6;"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                            <span>Cijev 2 (<span id="z124-d2-label">80</span>mm):</span> <b id="z124-v2-out">25.9 L/s</b>
                        </div>
                        <div style="height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
                            <div id="z124-bar-v2" style="width: 86%; height: 100%; background: #10b981;"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₁</div>
                    <div id="z124-v1-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂</div>
                    <div id="z124-v2-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂/v₁</div>
                    <div id="z124-ratio-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z124-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z124-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vtotS = document.getElementById('z124-vtot-slider'), d2S = document.getElementById('z124-d2-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<150; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random(), branch: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : 2 });

    function update() {
        const vtot_l = parseFloat(vtotS.value), d2_mm = parseFloat(d2S.value);
        const d1 = 0.04, d2 = d2_mm / 1000, L = 36, rho = 998, g = 9.81;
        const lam1 = 0.022, lam2 = 0.018;
        
        // v2 = v1 * sqrt( (lam1 * d2) / (lam2 * d1) )
        const ratio_v = Math.sqrt( (lam1 * d2) / (lam2 * d1) );
        const A1 = Math.PI * d1 * d1 / 4;
        const A2 = Math.PI * d2 * d2 / 4;
        
        // Vtot = A1v1 + A2v2 = A1v1 + A2 * ratio_v * v1 = v1 (A1 + A2*ratio_v)
        const v1 = (vtot_l / 1000) / (A1 + A2 * ratio_v);
        const v2 = v1 * ratio_v;
        const vdot1 = A1 * v1 * 1000;
        const vdot2 = A2 * v2 * 1000;
        
        const hw = lam1 * (L / d1) * (v1 * v1 / (2 * g));
        const pr = (rho * g * (13 - 5 + hw)) / 1000; // Simplified gauge at pump junction

        document.getElementById('z124-v-vtot').innerText = vtot_l;
        document.getElementById('z124-v-d2').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-d2-label').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-out').innerText = vdot1.toFixed(1) + " L/s";
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-out').innerText = vdot2.toFixed(1) + " L/s";
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v1').style.width = (vdot1/vtot_l * 100) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v2').style.width = (vdot2/vtot_l * 100) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z124-pr-val').innerText = pr.toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-card').textContent = v1.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-card').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-ratio-card').textContent = ratio_v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z124-explainer').textContent = `Za ukupni protok ${vtot_l.toFixed(0)} L/s i promjer druge cijevi ${d2_mm.toFixed(0)} mm uvjet jednakog gubitka daje omjer brzina v₂/v₁ = ${ratio_v.toFixed(2)}. Zato prva grana nosi ${vdot1.toFixed(1)} L/s, druga ${vdot2.toFixed(1)} L/s, a tlak u račvi ispada ${pr.toFixed(1)} kPa.`;

        draw(v1, v2, d1, d2);
    }

    function draw(v1, v2, d1, d2) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const cy = 200, ox = 150, scale = 1500;
        
        // Junctions
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); // R
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox + 250, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); // Confluence

        // Pipes
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0";
        // Branch 1 (Top)
        ctx.lineWidth = d1 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, cy); ctx.lineTo(ox, cy - 80); ctx.lineTo(ox+250, cy - 80); ctx.lineTo(ox+250, cy); ctx.stroke();
        // Branch 2 (Bottom)
        ctx.lineWidth = d2 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, cy); ctx.lineTo(ox, cy + 80); ctx.lineTo(ox+250, cy + 80); ctx.lineTo(ox+250, cy); ctx.stroke();

        // Particles
        particles.forEach(p => {
            const currentV = p.branch === 1 ? v1 : v2;
            p.t += 0.005 * currentV; if(p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            
            let px, py;
            const h = p.branch === 1 ? -80 : 80;
            if(p.t < 0.2) { px = ox; py = cy + (p.t/0.2)*h; }
            else if(p.t < 0.8) { px = ox + ((p.t-0.2)/0.6)*250; py = cy + h; }
            else { px = ox + 250; py = cy + h - ((p.t-0.8)/0.2)*h; }
            
            ctx.fillStyle = p.branch === 1 ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981";
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(() => update());
    }

    vtotS.oninput = update; d2S.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>


```

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- Flow Regime / Reynolds Widget -->
<div id="reynolds-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);">
    <h3 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 18px; color: #0f172a; font-weight: 800;">Vizualizacija Reynoldsovog broja</h3>
    <div style="padding: 12px 14px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.6;">
        <strong>Kako čitati režim:</strong> Ovdje je modelirana voda u maloj cijevi promjera <strong>2 mm</strong>, pa pomicanjem brzine možeš stvarno proći kroz sve tri zone. Lijevo vidiš kako se uređene strujnice pretvaraju u valovit i vrtložan tok, a desno kako se profil brzine iz paraboličnog spljoštava u turbulentni „čepasti" profil.
    </div>

    <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #172554 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; height: 340px; border: 1px solid #1e293b;">
        <canvas id="flow-canvas" width="920" height="340" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block;"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-top: 18px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="padding: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px;">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Brzina strujanja v: <span id="v-re-val" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v-re-slider" min="0.05" max="5" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width: 100%;">
            <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.76rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5;">Model: voda, ν = 1.0×10⁻⁶ m²/s, d = 2 mm.</div>
        </div>

        <div id="re-status" style="padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 800; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; background: #dcfce7; color: #166534;">
            Re = 1000 (Laminarno)
        </div>

        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 10px;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Dominira</div>
                <div id="re-dominant" style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">viskoznost</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: white; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Pragovi</div>
                <div id="re-thresholds" style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">2300 / 4000</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: white; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Profil</div>
                <div id="re-profile" style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">parabola</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="padding: 12px 14px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 10px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.6; margin-top: 16px;">
        <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="re-explainer"></span>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const vS = document.getElementById('v-re-slider');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('flow-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const status = document.getElementById('re-status');
    const lanes = [-0.86, -0.7, -0.54, -0.38, -0.22, -0.06, 0.06, 0.22, 0.38, 0.54, 0.7, 0.86];
    const particles = [];
    const state = { v: 0.5, re: 1000, regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0, time: 0 };
    const d = 0.002;
    const nu = 1e-6;

    lanes.forEach((lane, laneIndex) => {
        for (let index = 0; index < 8; index++) {
            particles.push({ lane, phase: (index / 8 + laneIndex * 0.025) % 1, bias: 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.3 });
        }
    });

    function classify(re) {
        if (re < 2300) return { regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0 };
        if (re < 4000) return { regime: 'Prijelazno', dominant: 'oba učinka', profile: 'spljošten', color: '#f59e0b', mix: (re - 2300) / 1700 };
        return { regime: 'Turbulentno', dominant: 'inercija', profile: 'čepast', color: '#ef4444', mix: 1 };
    }

    function laneSpeed(lane) {
        const r = Math.abs(lane);
        const laminar = 1.8 * (1 - r * r);
        const turbulent = 1.15 + 0.55 * (1 - Math.pow(r, 8));
        return (1 - state.mix) * laminar + state.mix * turbulent;
    }

    function update() {
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const re = v * d / nu;
        const cls = classify(re);

        state.v = v;
        state.re = re;
        Object.assign(state, cls);

        document.getElementById('v-re-val').textContent = v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('re-dominant').textContent = cls.dominant;
        document.getElementById('re-profile').textContent = cls.profile;
        document.getElementById('re-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s dobivaš Re ≈ ${re.toFixed(0)}. Zato je režim ${cls.regime.toLowerCase()}, dominira ${cls.dominant}, a profil brzine prelazi prema obliku: ${cls.profile}. Pragovi 2300 i 4000 označavaju kada uredni slojevi više ne mogu ostati stabilni.`;

        status.textContent = `Re = ${re.toFixed(0)} (${cls.regime})`;
        if (cls.regime === 'Laminarno') {
            status.style.background = '#dcfce7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#bbf7d0';
            status.style.color = '#166534';
        } else if (cls.regime === 'Prijelazno') {
            status.style.background = '#fef3c7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fde68a';
            status.style.color = '#92400e';
        } else {
            status.style.background = '#fee2e2';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
            status.style.color = '#991b1b';
        }
    }

    function streamlineY(x, lane, pipe) {
        const amp = state.regime === 'Laminarno' ? 0 : (state.regime === 'Prijelazno' ? 5 : 12);
        const ramp = Math.max(0, (x - pipe.x) / pipe.w);
        const wiggle = amp * ramp * (0.25 + Math.abs(lane)) * Math.sin(x * 0.03 + state.time * 0.05 + lane * 5.5);
        return pipe.cy + lane * (pipe.h / 2 - 12) + wiggle;
    }

    function draw() {
        state.time += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const pipe = { x: 42, y: 72, w: 520, h: 196, cy: 170 };
        const profile = { x: 620, y: 58, w: 230, h: 224 };

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0b1220';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, pipe.y, 0, pipe.y + pipe.h);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(96,165,250,0.28)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('strujnice u cijevi', pipe.x, 34);
        ctx.fillText('profil brzine', profile.x, 34);

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.35)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3;
        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let x = pipe.x + 8; x <= pipe.x + pipe.w - 8; x += 12) {
                const y = streamlineY(x, lane, pipe);
                if (x === pipe.x + 8) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.phase = (particle.phase + 0.0015 * state.v * laneSpeed(particle.lane) * particle.bias) % 1;
            const x = pipe.x + particle.phase * pipe.w;
            const y = streamlineY(x, particle.lane, pipe);
            ctx.fillStyle = state.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        if (state.regime === 'Turbulentno') {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(248,113,113,0.75)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.7;
            [pipe.x + 390, pipe.x + 450].forEach((cx, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(cx, pipe.cy + (index === 0 ? -42 : 44), 18, 0, Math.PI * 1.8);
                ctx.stroke();
            });
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(profile.x, profile.y, profile.w, profile.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.5)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + 12);
        ctx.lineTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + profile.h - 12);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('brzina', profile.x + 86, profile.y + profile.h - 12);

        ctx.strokeStyle = state.color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let first = true;
        for (let yIndex = 0; yIndex <= 40; yIndex += 1) {
            const lane = -1 + (yIndex / 40) * 2;
            const y = profile.y + 16 + (yIndex / 40) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            if (first) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                first = false;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            const y = profile.y + 16 + ((lane + 1) / 2) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.18)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, y);
            ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    vS.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>

```
